mapper.select: SELECT PRODUCT_CODE, PRODUCT_NAME, PRODUCT_TYPE, BASE_PREMIUM, MIN_AMOUNT, MAX_AMOUNT, MIN_AGE, MAX_AGE, PRODUCT_TERM, STATUS, REMARK, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_USER FROM tb_product WHERE PRODUCT_CODE = #{productCode}

SELECT PRODUCT_CODE, PRODUCT_NAME, PRODUCT_TYPE, BASE_PREMIUM, MIN_AMOUNT, MAX_AMOUNT, MIN_AGE, MAX_AGE, STATUS, REMARK, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_USER FROM tb_product WHERE PRODUCT_NAME = #{productName} LIMIT 1

SELECT PRODUCT_CODE, PRODUCT_NAME, PRODUCT_TYPE, BASE_PREMIUM, MIN_AMOUNT, MAX_AMOUNT, MIN_AGE, MAX_AGE, PRODUCT_TERM, STATUS, REMARK, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_USER FROM tb_product ORDER BY PRODUCT_CODE
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_product SET PRODUCT_NAME = #{dto.productName}, PRODUCT_TYPE = #{dto.productType}, BASE_PREMIUM = #{dto.basePremium}, MIN_AMOUNT = #{dto.minAmount}, MAX_AMOUNT = #{dto.maxAmount}, MIN_AGE = #{dto.minAge}, MAX_AGE = #{dto.maxAge}, STATUS = #{dto.status}, REMARK = #{dto.remark}, UPDATE_TIME = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, UPDATE_USER = #{updateUser} WHERE PRODUCT_CODE = #{code}
